0.text: Right pleural effusion measuring 1.5 cm at its deepest part

1.text: Left pleural effusion measuring 1.0 cm at its deepest part

2.text: Diffuse subpleural and intraparenchymal mass lesions in all segments of both lung parenchyma

3.text: Metastatic mass lesions in right lower lobe superior, lower lobe mediobasal, left upper lobe posterior, and left lower lobe superior segments

4.text: Centriacinar nodules resembling a budding tree pattern

6.text: Newly developed area measuring approximately 2.0x1.3 cm with air bronchograms in the paramediastinal area of the left lung lingula superior segment
